(00:01)
Hey, what’s up? So in this module, we’re going to be going over a ton of

think is good or bad about the leads, what I like about them, all that stuff as
well. So I’ve got them all in another screen you can’t see and I’ve got to figure
out here which one do I want to start with? I think I want to start with a sports
betting one actually.
(00:45)
Wait a second, I’ll put myself in the middle, not be in the way hopefully. Trying
to figure out where to put myself so that I won’t be too annoying. Yeah, middle
for now because really - actually, I’m going to put myself here because this
part is all you need to see, the lead and obviously, I’ve got two monitors so
I’m looking to the side, that’s why. But I like being on video, just being over the
shoulder, all that stuff.
(01:16)
So this is one where I wrote these offers back in the day for some guys who
were selling these football as in soccer betting tips overseas and Europe. It’s
for people who were betting on different football matches and who wanted
to be more consistent. They were mostly winning half the time and these
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

4	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Sports Betting
guys had different software and things that could help people win up to 8 out
of 10 times. Of course, that didn’t happen all the time, but that was the big
promise. I wrote this one in I guess, early 2014 and would have been around
the time I was developing RMBC. I honestly don’t know if I would have had
RMBC completely completed yet or not, but I think it’s a good lead and it’s
cool and let’s read through it and then we’ll see from there where it matches
with the outline and we’ll talk about everything else.
(02:12)
You have the headline, Tired of always making deposits into your bank account
instead of withdraws? “Limited time only: “Rogue” mathematician reveals the
secret behind a football betting formula so powerful - it accurately predicts
80% of all match outcomes. Read below to see how easy it is start winning 8
out of 10 football bets you place with no limit for the rest of your life.”
(02:33)
So let’s go and just talk about the headline and then we’ll go into the lead. I
think this part is good. We’re calling out a pain point: always making deposits
into your bank account instead of withdraws. Is it withdrawals or withdrawals,
I 	don’t 	even 	know. 	Guessing 	it’s 	withdraws. 	There’s 	a 	urgency. 	“Rogue
mathematician reveals his secret” is curiosity right there. We don’t have a
time frame to achieve results. I’m not going in order, but I’m going through the
headline checklist, which is a module that you’ll see in the next one.
(03:10)
I guess, the funny thing is thinking about the order of this. I want to do headlines
in the next one and we’re doing it more in-depth in the next one, but I’ll pull it
up real quick to just show you the general checklist now and then we’re going
to go in that more detail in the next module. Really quickly, just so you can
see. The checklist is curiosity, calling out the pain point, promising solutions,
specificity, simplicity, credibility, addressing skepticism and time frame to
achieve results of the promise.
(03:46)
So curiosity for sure, “Rogue mathematician reveals the secret.” Calling out
the pain point, yes. Promising solution, “accurately predicts 80% of all match
outcomes,” “start winning 8 out of 10 football bets you place with no limit for
the rest of your life.” Specificity, yeah, 80%, 8 out of 10, maybe 82%, 82.5%
may have been better. It’s hard winning 8 out of 10, but that may have made
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 9 --

5	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Sports Betting
it even better. Simplicity, “See how easy it is to start winning” and this promo
did do quite well for the client, but I do wonder. Actually, something in here
about how you don’t need to be a mathematician to use it, I think would have
improved the conversions on this and I didn’t have that.
(04:36)
Credibility/addressing 	skepticism. 	Not 	a 	ton, 	but 	I 	guess 	the 	rogue
mathematician at least there’s a little bit of credibility there. Somebody who I
think is a better, you think oh, maybe they know something I don’t, they know
the numbers, they can play the spread, things like that and the time frame to
achieve results of promise, there isn’t that. All of these won’t have headlines,
but since this one did, I figured might as well run through that with you.
(05:05)
Let’s go through this quickly. I’m going to read the whole lead and then come
back here. It’s not too long and you’ll notice that’s pretty common. “Dear friend,
every piece of football betting advice, every “hot” tip and every scrap of insider
information you’ve ever received will guarantee that you lose at least $10,000
over the course of your lifetime. That’s because no matter how much you
trust the person giving you this information, it is statistically impossible for
them to predict the outcome of these matches. They may think they have the
bulletproof strategy or that the tip they are giving you is a lock of the century,
but much more often than not, they’re dead wrong, which means you’ll just
keep losing and while that may sound harsh, you already know is true. If it
wasn’t, you wouldn’t be visiting this site. You’d be outside with your family,
swimming in your heated pool or taking your girlfriend shopping because you
know what a new purse may get you around bedtime or living in a 47 story
hotel suite in Monaco or Las Vegas or Macaw.” I’m going to come back to this
first line.
(05:57)
“So the fact that you are here shows me that you aren’t where you want to be
in your life. You’re frustrated about losing more money than you win, of seeing
cash exit your bank account almost every match and always telling that same
story to your friends and family of how “I should won, but then the strangest
thing happened.” But hope is just around the corner. In the next 2 minutes, I will
prove to you without a shadow of a doubt just how simple it is to make more
than €25,000 per year from the comfort of your own newly furnished home or
while drinking at a pub with your mates or while vacationing in Miami. You’ll
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 9 --

6	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Sports Betting
also find out why a complex math mathematical formula that took me more
than 5 years to develop, that others would kill to get in their hands can be the
instant trigger that increases your winning percentage by as much as 80%.
Because the truth is no advice, tips or sage wisdom will ever transform you
from a permanent loser to an 8 out of 10 time winner. But mathematics will.
(06:44)
‘I have never seen anything like this. In my first two weeks using your formula,
I have won 80% of my bets for a €26,700 haul. Seriously, I didn’t pass 6th
grade math class, but this is such an easy solution. I’m so thankful I found
your site and that you were still accepting new clients,’ Thomas in Dundalk,
Ireland.
(07:01)
‘My name is Gareth Henderson and since I could walk, I have been obsessed
with only two things: football and numbers. In my past life as a financial
analysis for one of the largest banks in the world, I played with statistics all
day long’” and from there it goes into the lead. This is actually start of the
background story of who am I that’s right here.
(07:21)
I like the headline which is doing a lot of the problem and the headline is
calling out the problem as well and then in the lead here, every piece of advice,
every “hot” tip, everything will guarantee you lose $10,000 over the course
of your lifetime. This is a very contrarian lead out of the gate. I think if you
just said it’s wrong, if all this stuff you’ve received is wrong or isn’t going to
help, it would be one thing. But I think saying it will guarantee that you lose
at least €10,000 is enough to get people’s attention. I think that’s one of the
reasons that that works there and it’s discounting solutions. “That’s because
no matter how much you trust the person, it’s statistically impossible for them
to predict the outcome of these matches” teasing the mechanism a little bit
here, not a ton, but really going down on the pain point.
(08:18)
Here’s where we’re really doing a good job of we’re not teasing an emotional
discovery story, but we are creating emotion for them. That’s one thing, really
that I think is an important element is even if you don’t have an emotional
discovery story, you can still be creating a lot of emotion and using emotion.
That’s one thing, honestly, going through a lot of my sales letters and especially
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 9 --

7	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Sports Betting
my older sales letters from my peak as far as being prolific goes; 2014, 2015,
2016, 2017, I guess and then I’ve had some good stretches.
(08:54)
I mean, the cool thing - not to just start talking about myself - but the cool
thing about me is that I’m actively doing this now, too. I have stuff that’s
actively crushing and going well now. But one thing I’m feeling inspired by as
I made this course, going through it is how damn, I used to do such a good
job of just painting a picture of life and really taking it to a whole another level
and dimension, like what we call dimensionalizing benefits. It’s not just have
money, but it’s dimensionalizing. Going through layers like swimming in your
heated pool, taking your girlfriend shopping are pain points, too really taking
them to a different and deeper levels.
(09:26)
This stuff here, it’s teasing some of the emotion and frustration about it. This
line here obviously looking back at it, it’s a little bit cringe-worthy. It was written
in 2014 and obviously, it’s 2020 now. I don’t know if I fully regret it because
I think a lot of the target demographic was men who are single, hanging out
at the pub, guy talk type stuff and that’s what the purpose is of this letter. So
from that perspective, honestly, it’s sexist and chauvinistic, but I mean it’s
also how maybe these men talk or at least I assumed they would talk and so it
is what it is, I guess. But painting a picture of their life and you’re doing it like
it means you’re not going to be doing it so even though, you’re saying you’re
not going to be doing these things, you’re also sort of making them want to
do those things.
(10:27)
“So the fact that you’re here shows me you aren’t where you want to be in
your life. You’re frustrated about losing more money than you win, of seeing
cash exit your bank account after almost every match and always telling that
same story to your friends and family of how ‘I should have won, but then the
strangest thing happened.’ But hope is just around the corner.” So again, more
pain point.
(10:46)
Now we’re going to promise the solution, though. “I will prove to you without
a shadow of doubt, just how simple it is to make more than €25,000 per year
from the comfort of your own newly furnished home or while drinking at a pub
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 9 --

8	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Sports Betting
with your mates or on vacation in Miami. You’ll also find out why a complex
mathematical formula that took me more than 5 years to develop, that others
would kill to get in their hands can be an instant trigger that increases your
winning percentage by as much as 80%.” That’s a promise but we’re also
teasing the unique mechanism behind the solution and it’s a fascination, too
if we’re being honest and obviously, we’ve gone through fascinations already.
(11:23)
So you have fascinations there and then we do have the easy who it works
for. I mean it talks about how...I guess, it doesn’t really say that this works for
anybody, but I feel like it’s implied if you’re at the pub or whatever and then this
idea here, “I didn’t pass 6th grade math class but such an easy solution.” So
the idea that it can work even if you’re not mathematically savvy. Maybe that
could’ve been done a little bit higher up, but I think there’s a bit of a qualifier
there. Credibility builder, again, really the mathematician is probably the biggest
thing and it does have a broad testimonial.
(12:08)
When you look at it from that perspective, it is covering or checking a lot
of these boxes here and it also was nice as this headline complex, which
we’re going to learn all about in the next module,does do a lot of the heavy
lifting because it does cover calling out the pain point, promising the solution,
teasing a unique mechanism with a...actually it doesn’t really tease a unique
mechanism. I take that back but it does your credibility builder a little bit. I
mean, it does a lot of stuff and again, from the contrarian aspect of it, it’s
not the contrarian aspect of the mechanism exactly but it does have this
contrarian start to it. So I really like this lead and I’ll just do each one is a new
video so let me stop this one and we’ll do the next one after.
